title: mentha × dumetorum var. cinerea
intro: Mentha × dumetorum var. cinerea is a variety of the Mentha dumetorum plant, commonly known as the 'grey mint'. It is a hybrid of peppermint and watermint, with a greyish appearance and a stronger minty flavor than peppermint. The medicinal properties of Mentha × dumetorum var. cinerea include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of using this plant include relief from headaches, nausea, and respiratory issues, and it can also be used to aid in digestion and reduce stress, with herbal preparations such as tea, essential oil, and tincture being commonly used.
